_comment: Trigger eval for thai-dish-picking skill. 10 should-trigger + 10 should-not-trigger = 20 cases. Mix of English and Thai-script positive cases. Negatives test the 'NOT for restaurant-finding, recipes, or non-Thai cuisine' rule from the description.

evals.query: /thai-dish-picking
what should I eat for lunch? in Thailand, mood is meh, weather is hot
กินอะไรดี อยู่กรุงเทพ ตอนนี้ร้อนมาก
I'm hungry, you pick something Thai for me. I had pad krapao yesterday
ไม่รู้จะกินอะไร ช่วยแนะนำหน่อย แถวสีลม
lunch ideas — something light, kind of hot today, near a Central food court
เมนูแนะนำสำหรับเย็นนี้ อยากกินอะไรไม่ซ้ำกับมื้อเที่ยง (ผัดไทย)
you pick. ไรก็ได้ but make it interesting, not the famous-tourist stuff
I want noodles but not pad thai. what else is there in Thailand worth eating?
vegetarian Thai lunch in Bangkok — the actual range, not just pad thai with no shrimp
where's the best place to eat pad thai in Bangkok?
how do I make tom yum kung at home?
what's the difference between Northern and Southern Thai cuisine?
I'm in Tokyo, what should I eat for lunch?
explain what som tam is — I've never had it
is Thai food generally healthy?
I want to learn to cook one new Thai dish a week. where should I start?
best Thai restaurants in San Francisco?
what should I eat for breakfast in Vietnam?
ราคาผัดไทยที่ห้าง อยากรู้ว่าแพงไปไหม
